summary.sosovalue: Highly positive community sentiment driven by testnet airdrop claims, SoPoints rankings, and trading activity promotions. Users celebrate rewards, share referrals, and praise the platform as a good project with low fees.
summary.sodex: Strongly positive with excitement over testnet rewards (1M $SOSO), mainnet farming, and weekly SoPoints distributions. Minor FUD on distribution fairness exists but is overshadowed by promotional activity and claims.
summary.ssi: Positive mentions tied to staking rewards (Epoch 3 airdrop), yield boosts, and integrations with SoDEX. Limited standalone discussion but integrated positively into ecosystem hype.
